name: South Park The full RPG!
description:
Well, since there isn't any proper south park bot, i decided to make one myself

lorebooks will be added on the future

every character is aged but, still mantaining the goofness, but slightly more mature (like recently 18)

there will be the "Make your own scenario message" so you can make yourself, any scenario you wish

Anything wrong about speech, personality and stuff, please comment, so i will try to fix it, even if it is quite hard to

Most of the characters are there, i skipped the parents tho, but if you want to i add them, or any other character that is missing, comment bellow

consider buying a comission from me, it would help :)

(ilimited Bot to support violence and sensitive themes, letting you free to make the chaos)

Characters on this bot!
